name: goalbuddy
description: Turn broad Claude Code and Codex work into verified GoalBuddy boards with Scout, Judge, Worker, visual boards, and receipts.

interface.shortDescription: Turn broad Claude Code or Codex work into verified Scout/Judge/Worker boards
interface.longDescription: GoalBuddy packages a structured goal workflow for broad, long-running, or ambiguous engineering work in Claude Code or Codex. It creates durable goal charters, task boards, visual board surfaces, receipts, verification gates, extension handoffs, and compatibility guidance for teams moving from goal-maker.
defaultPrompt: $goal-prep prepare a GoalBuddy board for this goal
